summary: Cavallo Simple Hoof Boot in black, sold in pairs, in Regular and Slim sole sizes 0-6. Genuine leather boot for daily riding, trail, and rehab from laminitis, navicular, and abscesses.
Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot in black, sold per single boot, Regular and Slim sole sizes 0-6. Features a moulded Pro Mesh TPU honeycomb upper for riding, jumping, dressage, and rehab.
Cavallo Sport Hoof Boot, sold in pairs, Regular and Slim sole sizes 0-6. Low-profile 1680 Denier nylon boot with post-peg side closure and reflective piping for riding and rehab.
Cavallo ELB (Entry Level Boot) in black, sold per single boot, Regular and Slim sole sizes 0-6. Budget 1680 Denier nylon boot with Velcro closure for arena, light trails, and spare-tire use.
Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot in green, sold per single boot, Regular and Slim sole sizes 0-6. Pro Mesh TPU honeycomb upper boot for trail riding, jumping, dressage, and therapeutic use.
Cavallo ELB Bling Hoof Boot, sold per single boot, Regular and Slim sole, discontinued at 70% off with code HURRY70. 1680 Denier nylon boot with Velcro closure for everyday riding.
Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot in purple, sold per single boot, Regular and Slim sole sizes 0-6. Pro Mesh TPU honeycomb upper boot for trail riding, high-impact sports, and rehab.
Cavallo CLB 'Cute Little Boot' in Bling, sold in pairs, sizes M1-M4 for miniature horses and ponies. Official boot of the AMHA for rehab, driving, arena, trail, and therapy minis.
Cavallo CLB 'Cute Little Boot' in Metallic Blue, sold in pairs, sizes M1-M4 for miniature horses. Official AMHA boot for hoof rehab, driving, arena and trail work, and therapy minis.
Cavallo CLB 'Cute Little Boot' in Unicorn Pink, sold in pairs, sizes M1-M4 for miniature horses. Official AMHA boot for hoof rehab, driving, arena and trail work, and therapy minis.
Cavallo CLB 'Cute Little Boot' in black, sold in pairs, sizes M1-M4 for miniature horses and ponies. Official AMHA boot for hoof rehab after laminitis, driving, arena, trail, and therapy.
FAQ comparing Cavallo Hoof Boots to other brands across durability, protection, application, fit, and comfort, with testimonials and reasons to choose Cavallo.
